title: codereview pass2: No validation for current_channel range in Rust (0-15 per Python)
description: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:83 - Announce and Builder should validate current_channel <=15 like Python __post_init__. P2 robustness for wire format. codereview
close_reason: Added InvalidChannel to AnnounceError + validation (0<= <=15) in Announce::from_bytes (rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:106) and AnnounceBuilder::write_to (rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:166). Updated all 4 AnnounceBuilder initializers in lichen-node/src/announce.rs (lines ~443,511,540,627). Added invalid_channel test. Ran 3 codereview passes, filed findings as beads project-LICHEN-7fhs/mv61/p67i. cargo check -p lichen-core passes. Only closed after 3 passes per instructions.
